🎮 How to Play This Awesome Game

Playing is super easy! You have a stretchy, rubbery arm that can reach anywhere.

1. Touch on the screen to aim your hand.
2. Release.
3. Smack the target to win!

🥊 Use Your Best Moves

Read field updates from journalist Vera Liang inside the app, share findings in researcher discussions, and compare evidence with the global community of investigators.

About the investigation

Maren Calloway was tracking strange phenomena before she vanished from Linden Hollow, Ohio, on November 4, 1983. Forty-two years later, journals connected to her work were found hidden in the walls of her home on Bellweather Lane. The Bellweather Project is the public investigation into what she found, and what is happening now in the same places she once mapped.

What you do in the app

top_apps.name: DesiLudo
top_apps.description_short: Move your red, yellow, green, and blue pieces using strategy.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
The rules are very simple, anyone can start and quickly become a master.

At the start of the game, each player begins with four pieces on their starting square. During the game, players take turns rolling the dice. A 6 is rolled, and that player's piece is placed on their starting square. The main objective is to remove all four pieces from your side of the board before any of your opponents.

- A piece can only move when a 6 is rolled.
- Players take turns rolling the dice. If a player rolls a 6, they get another chance to roll.
- All pieces must reach the center of the board to win the game.
- Pieces move clockwise based on the number rolled on the dice.
- Knocking down an opponent's piece grants an extra chance to roll the dice.

Spending happy times together, constantly improving your chess skills, showcasing your personal talents, and becoming a master player!

Every board is covered in arrows. Tap to rotate them until they point to open space and fly off. The controls could not be simpler. The catch is that you are racing a countdown, and every wrong tap costs you. Make too many mistakes and the level ends on the spot.

Early boards ease you in with a forgiving clock and plenty of breathing room. Later levels squeeze both your time and your mistake limit until you are planning three moves ahead while the seconds drop. The puzzles are handcrafted, so the difficulty ramp feels fair instead of randomly punishing.

If you want a puzzle game that stays gentle at first but actually tests your nerves later, this one is worth a try.

On his return to the neighborhood, a couple of corrupt cops frame him for homicide. CJ is forced on a journey that takes him across the entire state of San Andreas, to save his family and to take control of the streets.

GTA 6 Rockstar Games brings its biggest release to mobile yet with a vast open-world covering the state of San Andreas and its three major cities – Los Santos, San Fierro and Las Venturas – with enhanced visual fidelity and over 70 hours of GTA VI gameplay.

top_apps.name: Аvіator Lift

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Аvіator Lift is a fast-paced arcade flight game where timing and precision keep you in the air.
A plane moves forward and gradually gains altitude, but unstable air constantly pulls it down. Your task is to catch short lift impulses and stay aloft.

Impulse zones appear in the air as thin waves or rings. Tap at the exact moment when the plane passes through one to gain a sharp upward boost. Miss the timing, and the plane begins to lose height.

Each tap is a single chance to catch the impulse. Zones appear in random positions and at different speeds, making every run unpredictable. As you climb higher, gaps between impulses increase, and falling becomes faster without accurate hits. Some impulses provide weaker boosts, adding extra challenge.

Reach greater heights or survive as long as possible to improve your result.
Lose control and fall off the screen — the run ends.

top_apps.name: 風と竜の歌
top_apps.description_short: Wind and Dragon's Healing Adventure MMO
top_apps.description_excerpt:
5月27日（水）11：00 正式リリース！
ログインだけで「SR仲間・モリバンバ」必ずGET！
更に「乗騎・順蜂宅急便」など豪華キャンペーンも実施！

千年の昔、人と竜は風の契りを結び、共に空を駆けた。
今や竜は嵐の深淵に隠れ、ただ伝説だけが残された。
風に選ばれた少年少女は竜の呼び声を感じ、契りの相手を求めて旅立った。
風と竜の冒険が、ここに幕を開ける。

▼ゲームの特長▼

【やり込み要素がたくさん】
広大な世界観と無限の育成要素、どこまでも熱くなれる放置型MMORPG！
かわいい衣装や装飾品も豊富に揃い、自由にカスタマイズ可能！
友達を作って、みんなで一緒に大冒険。
ソロでも、仲間とでも、自分だけの遊び方で楽しめる。

【初心者ボーナス満載！毎日100連ガチャもらえる】
リリース記念として、限定衣装セットをプレゼント！
さらに、毎日ログインするだけで100連ガチャがもらえる。最大2000連も可能！
デイリーサインイン・レベル達成ボーナス・育成応援特典など、初心者でも簡単に成長できる仕組みが充実。

【縦画面で片手操作も簡単！】
放置でもキャラは成長し続けるので、忙しい日常でも無理なく育成可能！
イベント報酬一括回収システム搭載、時間がなくてもサクッと回収できてストレスフリー！

【バトルこそが冒険】
個人対戦型PVP、ギルド団体戦、協力型ダンジョン、 サバイバー公平対戦型……
多彩なイベントタイプが続々登場！
お好みのイベントにぜひ参加してください。

最低動作環境
Android 4.4、RAM4GB以上

お問い合わせ：support@sp-games.com

top_apps.name: Snake Maze: Escape Puzzle

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Snake Maze: Escape Puzzle - Free the Serpents!
Think you've got what it takes to beat the maze? In Snake Maze: Escape Puzzle, you're faced with a twisted labyrinth where serpents are trapped in a deadlock. These snakes are all tangled up, blocking each other's routes to freedom. Your mission? Strategically maneuver each snake out of the maze—but choose wisely! Only the right snake can move at the right moment.
How to Play:
Slide to Liberate: Tap any snake's head and drag it toward the exit. But watch out—if the path is blocked, that serpent stays put!
Sequence is Everything: Plan your moves carefully! The order in which you free the snakes determines your success. One wrong move and you'll create an impossible gridlock.
Maze Mastery Awaits: Start with beginner-friendly puzzles and work your way up to mind-bending mazes packed with overlapping serpentine challenges.
Zen-Like Flow: Enjoy the calming, addictive sensation of clearing each maze and watching every snake find its way home.
Can you outsmart the maze and rescue every trapped serpent? Download Snake Maze: Escape Puzzle today and prove your puzzle-solving prowess!

Words For Joy is a level-based word game where every decision matters. Each level presents three carefully crafted questions, and every question gives you two possible word choices. Only one is correct. Choose wisely, because one wrong answer means failure — and you’ll need to start the level again.
This simple rule creates a surprisingly deep and exciting experience. There’s no guessing your way through. To succeed, you’ll need a solid understanding of vocabulary, context, and word usage — along with the ability to stay calm under pressure.
How the Game Works
Each level contains 3 word-selection questions
Every question offers 2 possible answers
Answer all three correctly to pass the level
One mistake ends the run
Difficulty increases gradually, introducing richer vocabulary and trickier word distinctions

top_apps.name: Teen Patti Master Game
top_apps.description_short: A three-card poker game based on the classic Teen Patti rules.
top_apps.description_excerpt: Teen Patti Master Game delivers a traditional three-card gameplay experience based on classic Teen Patti rules, where players compete to form the highest-ranking hand and make strategic betting decisions in every round. The game focuses on card strength, timing, and player judgment. Each round begins with players receiving three cards and choosing to play blind or seen. Players can call, raise, or fold depending on their confidence and reading of the table. Understanding hand rankings such as Trail (three of a kind), Pure Sequence, Sequence, Color, Pair, and High Card is essential for making effective decisions. The gameplay emphasizes observing opponents, managing bets, and choosing the right moments to continue or exit a round. As the pot increases, players must balance risk and reward while adapting to different situations. Players earn in-game currency through gameplay, which can be used to access different tables, gameplay variations, and additional features, expanding the overall experience. This game does not include any real money or any opportunities to win real money or real-world rewards. It is purely a simulation game where players earn and use virtual currency only.

top_apps.name: Arrows Go - Zen Puzzle Escape
top_apps.description_short: Daily Puzzle To Calm Your Mind
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Clear the grid. Clear your mind. 🌿
Arrow Zen is a puzzle game designed to feel like a breathing exercise. Each level is a grid of tangled arrows. Your task is to find the one with an open path, tap it, and watch it glide away in silence. One by one, the clutter dissolves. The grid empties. Your thoughts settle.
There's no timer counting down. No leaderboard pushing you to rush. No flashing alerts or combo streaks demanding your attention. Just a quiet space where the only thing that matters is the next move.
🌙 A MOMENT OF STILLNESS
Most puzzle games want your adrenaline. Arrow Zen wants your attention — the gentle, unhurried kind. The kind you feel when you sit with a cup of tea and watch the steam rise. Tap an arrow. Watch it leave. Notice the space it opens. Breathe.
Each level is a small meditation. You study the grid. You notice which arrows depend on others. You find the thread to pull, and slowly, patiently, you untangle everything. The last arrow slides away, the screen goes quiet, and for a moment — nothing needs solving.
🍃 DESIGNED FOR CALM
Every detail in Arrow Zen exists to reduce noise, not add it:

Muted, earthy color palette — soft tones...

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
